title: Training Protocol and Deployments
author: Van Wijk, Kim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deliverable describes the protocol used for training sessions organized by the Equal-Life project and how this protocal was developed. It also includes summaries of the training sessions that were held.
steps_raw: This deliverable describes the protocol used for training sessions organized by the Equal-Life project and how this protocal was developed. It also includes summaries of the training sessions that were held.
